2606.11898.title: GraspLLM: Towards Zero-Shot Generalization on Text-Attributed Graphs with LLMs
2606.11898.paper_summary: Research on Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) has gained significant attention recently due to its broad applications across various real-world data scenarios, such as citation networks, e-commerce platforms, social media, and web pages. Inspired by the remarkable semantic understanding ability of Large Language Models (LLMs), there have been numerous attempts to integrate LLMs into TAGs. However, existing methods still struggle to generalize across diverse graphs and tasks, and their ability to capture transferable graph structural patterns remains limited. To address this, we introduce the GraspLLM, a framework that combines Graph structural comprehension with semantic understanding prowess of LLMs to enhance the cross-dataset and cross-task generalizability. Specifically, we represent node texts from different graphs in a unified semantic space with a frozen general embedding model, on top of which we perform motif-aware contrastive learning across multiple motif-induced adjacency matrices to extract dataset-agnostic structural information. Then, with our proposed optimal contextual subgraph, we extract the most contextually relevant subgraph for each target node and align these subgraphs to the token space of LLM via an alignment projector. Extensive experiments on TAG benchmark datasets spanning diverse domains reveal that GraspLLM consistently outperforms previous LLM-based methods for TAGs, especially in zero-shot scenarios, highlighting its strong generalizability across different datasets and tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Heinz217/GraspLLM.
2606.11898.paper_summary_zh: 研究文本屬性圖 (TAGs) 最近因其在各種現實世界數據場景中的廣泛應用而受到極大關注，例如引用網絡、電子商務平台、社交媒體和網頁。受到大型語言模型 (LLMs) 卓越的語義理解能力啟發，已有許多嘗試將 LLMs 整合到 TAGs 中。然而，現有方法在不同圖形和任務之間的泛化能力仍然存在困難，並且它們捕捉可轉移圖形結構模式的能力仍然有限。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 GraspLLM，一個將圖形結構理解與 LLM 的語義理解能力相結合的框架，以增強跨數據集和跨任務的泛化能力。具體而言，我們使用一個凍結的通用嵌入模型，將來自不同圖形的節點文本表示為統一的語義空間，在此基礎上，我們在多個由主題誘導的鄰接矩陣上進行主題感知對比學習，以提取與數據集無關的結構信息。然後，通過我們提出的最佳上下文子圖，我們為每個目標節點提取最具上下文相關性的子圖，並通過對齊投影器將這些子圖對齊到 LLM 的標記空間。對跨越不同領域的 TAG 基準數據集進行的廣泛實驗顯示，GraspLLM 在 TAGs 的 LLM 基礎方法中始終表現優於之前的方法，特別是在零樣本場景中，突顯了其在不同數據集和任務中的強泛化能力。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/Heinz217/GraspLLM 獲得。
2606.11898.author: Hengyi Feng et.al.
2606.11898.authors: Hengyi Feng, Zeang Sheng, Meiyi Qiang, Li Yang, Wentao Zhang
